creator: peters@netreconsys.com
text:
while doing a : portsnap fetch update

I get :

Looking up portsnap.FreeBSD.org mirrors... 2 mirrors found.
Fetching snapshot tag from portsnap1.FreeBSD.org... done.
Fetching snapshot metadata... fetch: http://portsnap1.FreeBSD.org/t/db711d002fe0e7cde5636fdce0a2134fd203eeb4c84eac10f18318c6d01e7181: Not Found
sha256: db711d002fe0e7cde5636fdce0a2134fd203eeb4c84eac10f18318c6d01e7181: No such file or directory
[: !=: unexpected operator
mv: rename db711d002fe0e7cde5636fdce0a2134fd203eeb4c84eac10f18318c6d01e7181 to tINDEX.new: No such file or directory
done.
grep: tINDEX.new: No such file or directory
look: tINDEX.new: No such file or directory

Portsnap metadata appears bogus.
Cowardly refusing to proceed any further.

How-To-Repeat: run : portsnap fetch update
